title: Provasoli Enriched Seawater (PES) medium solution
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"fkk6e","text":"This protocol outlines the steps required to prepare Provasoli Enriched Seawater (PES) medium in accordance with the method by Provasoli (1966).","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}},{"key":"frnn0","text":" ","type":"atomic","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[{"key":0,"offset":0,"length":1}],"data":{}},{"key":"4n8t","text":"","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{"0":{"type":"citation","mutability":"IMMUTABLE","data":{"guid":"A8ADEEDEE1FA11EE999C0A58A9FEAC02","title":"Media and prospects for the cultivation of marine algae","protocol_guid":"","journal":"Proceedings of the US-Japan Conference","date":null,"created_on":"1966-09-01T00:00:00Z","doi":"https://cir.nii.ac.jp/crid/1572824499547489536","authors":"L. Provasoli","can_edit":false}}}}
before_start: {"blocks":[{"key":"943gd","text":"It is important to follow the order of chemicals added as shown in the protocol.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[{"style":"bold","offset":0,"length":80}],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: 6000 mL MilliQ water Contributed by users
Add 23.4 g HEPES Sodium salt Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #H7006 (or 30 g Tris buffer)
Add 1500 mL P II-solution go to step #1
5000 mL MilliQ water Contributed by users
Add 1500 mL Fe-solution go to step #2
5000 mL MilliQ water Contributed by users
Add 21 g Sodium nitrate Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #S5506
Add 2.12 g Sodium glycerophosphate hydrate Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich)
Add 16 mg Potassium iodide Contributed by users
Pasteurise for 02:00:00 at 99 °C
Vitamins to be added through a sterile single injection with a front filter (0.2 μm) in the cooled off primary solution (maximum temperature of 60 °C ).
30 mL Vitamin B12 Fisher Scientific Catalog #68-19-9 (10 mg per 500 ml MilliQ water Contributed by users )
30 mL Thiamine HCl P212121 (500 mg per 500 ml MilliQ water Contributed by users )
30 mL Biotin P212121 (5 mg per 500 ml MilliQ water Contributed by users )
Store PES in Duran bottles in a cold and dark setting at 10 °C . Duran® laboratory bottles, with caps (Glass bottle, Duran, Z305197-10EA, 500 ml)
Culturing medium is created by adding 200 mL PES to 10 L sterile seawater.
Add 5 g Titriplex® III solution Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) (CAS: 139-33-3)
Add 5.7 g Boric acid Fisher Scientific Catalog #BP1681
Add 0.62 g Manganese sulfate, monohydrate Bio Basic Inc. Catalog #MB0334.SIZE.500g
Add 0.11 g Zinc sulfate heptahydrate Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #204986
Add 0.024 g Cobalt(II) sulfate heptahydrate Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich)
Add 0.245 g Iron(III) chloride hexahydrate Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #44944
Add 3.3 g Titriplex® III solution Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) (CAS: 139-33-3)
Add 3.51 g Ammonium iron(II) sulfate hexahydrate Bio Basic Inc. Catalog #AB0065.SIZE.500g Solution equals 0.1 mg Fe 2+ x ml -1
creator: Anton Kuech
